context: Tests whether the agent applies the correct affiliate commission rates for open vs. targeted collaboration, documents safe inventory practices (sub-5-minute sync, immediate order lock), prescribes the 48-hour fulfilment window, recommends LIVE Shopping for the product launch, advises on image requirements, and includes brand-safety UGC monitoring guidance.

checklist.name: Open collaboration commission 10-15%
checklist.description: The open-collaboration commission rate in affiliate-setup.ts is set to a value between 0.10 and 0.15 (10%–15%), not higher or lower

checklist.name: Targeted invitation commission 20%
checklist.description: The targeted creator invitation function uses a commission rate of 0.20 (20%), not a different value

checklist.name: Inventory sync within 5 minutes
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md states that TikTok Shop inventory must be updated within 5 minutes of any order or stock change across all channels

checklist.name: Immediate inventory lock on order creation
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md describes locking/reserving inventory on TikTok Shop at the moment an order is created (before fulfilment confirmation), not after

checklist.name: 48-hour fulfilment target
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md specifies a 48-hour fulfilment window for TikTok Shop orders

checklist.name: Late shipment rate threshold
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md mentions that exceeding a 2% late shipment rate triggers seller account warnings

checklist.name: LIVE Shopping for product launch
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md recommends using a LIVE Shopping event specifically for the new product launch (not just general advice about going live)

checklist.name: Products Active before going live
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md states that products must have 'Active' status in TikTok Shop before a LIVE event, and notes the 24-48 hour review period

checklist.name: Image aspect ratio guidance
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md specifies square or 9:16 (portrait) aspect ratio for TikTok Shop product images, and advises against landscape

checklist.name: Image background and overlay rules
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md states images should have a white or clean background and should NOT include text overlays

checklist.name: Lock product prices for affiliates
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md advises locking product prices or warns that price changes force creator content to be re-tagged

checklist.name: UGC monitoring for brand safety
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md includes a step to regularly review affiliate/UGC content and have a content reporting process, noting creators post without prior approval in Open Collaboration

checklist.name: Free shipping minimum cart value
checklist.description: PLAYBOOK.md recommends setting a minimum cart value for free shipping to reduce abandonment driven by visible shipping costs
